round_summary: All three agents explicitly acknowledge agreed caps, signal compliance efforts, and appeal to shared norms—Agent 2 demonstrates material commitment through cow reduction while agents invoke trust-rebuilding language around coordination.

All three agents reinforce a cooperative equilibrium through explicit commitment to restraint, mutual accountability, and transparent ratification of a jointly-recognized 18-cow sustainable stocking norm.
